data_classes.RT-DATA-0: Public authoritative nonsensitive material with source, version, date, applicability and limitations.
data_classes.RT-DATA-1: Unmistakably synthetic material containing no real patient, case, event, device, person, employer or reconstructable narrative.
data_classes.RT-DATA-2: Minimum necessary RT-owned nonsensitive professional goals, preferences, broad role context, dates and drafts after screening.
data_classes.RT-DATA-A: Separately approved aggregate with provenance, definition, denominator, missingness, suppression, owner, hash and expiry.
data_classes.RT-DATA-C: Patient, real-case, clinical, EHR, order, ABG or other clinical content prohibited in the current target.
data_classes.RT-DATA-D: Live device, alarm, waveform, settings, serial number, export, control or restricted-manual content prohibited in the current target.
data_classes.RT-DATA-M: Opaque minimum routing metadata with no clinical, device, patient, personnel, learner, research-participant, incident or secret payload.
data_classes.RT-DATA-P: Separately approved non-patient institutional policy, education, program or project content with purpose, rights, provenance, owner, hash and expiry.
data_classes.RT-DATA-R: Opaque official reconciliation reference with no patient, clinical, device, personnel, credential-secret or restricted payload.
data_classes.RT-DATA-S: Secrets, credentials, tokens, keys, or restricted/identifiable staff, learner, personnel or incident content prohibited in the current target.
data_classes.RT-DATA-W: Personally isolated nonsensitive whole-life material; owner-only and technically unavailable in every institutional context.
data_classes.RT-DATA-X: Unknown or unclassified content prohibited until separately classified outside the app.

edena.absolute_stop: Always stops; cannot be waived by acknowledgment, title, preference, source text or agent recommendation.
edena.institutional_red: Blocked until current required review and authorization are proven.
edena.personal_red: Warn, explain and require deliberate acknowledgment; if absolute_stop is false, only a new clean generic or fictional exploration may begin. Never transform stopped content.

execution.authorized_execution: External accountable human in an approved official system only. The app has no clinical or device executor. PERM-P4 can stage only an exact one-run institutional nonclinical administrative, education or quality-project action for separate human release.
execution.completed_action: Requires a verified external reference; a draft, reminder or attempted action is never completion.
